heart_line.begins_below_middle: Selfish when it comes to love.
heart_line.begins_between_middle_index: Caring and understanding. A balance between emotional needs.
heart_line.is_wavy: Many relationships, absence of serious relationships.
heart_line.is_clear_and_deep: You will have a stable emotional life.

head_line.is_short: Prefers physical achievements over mental ones.
head_line.curves_upward: Aptitude for math, business, and logic.
head_line.is_deep_long: Thinking is clear and focused. The longer and deeper the head line is the more intricate your thinking process will be.
head_line.is_straight: Thinks realistically. You are very down-to-earth and logical.
head_line.is_broken: Inconsistencies in thought or has varying interests.
head_line.has_fork: A 'writer’s fork'. This means that you may be more inventive and lean towards speaking or writing.

life_line.is_long_deep: You’ll experience an abundance of vitality in your life.
life_line.reaches_middle: You’ll have more energy throughout your life.
life_line.starts_near_thumb: You’re more likely to take life as it is handed to you.
life_line.starts_in_middle: You’ve got a great balance of both of these aspects.
